title: RWA agricultural asset verification document
description: Off-chain payload referenced by Asset.metadata_uri (IPFS, HTTPS, or Arweave). Used to link a Solana mint to real-world disclosure: location, cadastral or permit references, and evidence hashes. This MVP simulates attestation: the URI is not validated on-chain; indexers and investors verify JSON shape and content.

asset_id.description: Opaque id (e.g. base58 mint or internal SKU)

proof.description: Document hash (hex), file URI, or short attestation text for hackathon demo
